revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''1-2-020

Shipping manoeuvres made in order to approach the coast.


Note: The English term landfall means only the first sighting of land when approaching from seaward.

{{IALAFooter}}
